entities.name: Airtable
entities.context: Database tool used for storing Candidate records, Job Openings, Employers, and Resume attachments

entities.name: GDrive
entities.context: Google Drive - file storage for Hiring POV documents

entities.name: Candidate record
entities.context: Data structure representing a candidate in the pipeline

entities.name: Job Opening
entities.context: Data structure linked to Candidate records and Employers

entities.name: Employer
entities.context: Organization entity linked to Job Openings

entities.name: JD text
entities.context: Job Description text associated with Job Openings

entities.name: Hiring POV
entities.context: Hiring Point of View document - analysis framework for job requirements

entities.name: Resume
entities.context: Candidate resume stored as Airtable attachment

relationships.context: Candidate records link to Job Openings in Airtable
Job Openings are associated with Employers
Hiring POV documents stored in Google Drive
Resumes stored as attachments in Airtable
Candidate records have associated resume attachments
